summary: AI-Augmented Full-Stack DevOps Engineer with 4+ years of experience spanning Azure cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, full-stack development, and AI-powered workflows. Currently leading end-to-end product development at Ayonic (Berlin) — building CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, deploying Flutter mobile apps to iOS/Android, managing cloud servers, and integrating Stripe/PayPal payments.

skills.Cloud & Infrastructure: Azure (VMs, AKS, App Services, Functions), Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Cloudflare, Nginx, Linux
skills.CI/CD & DevOps: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Git, Automated Deployments, ArgoCD, Jenkins
skills.Backend: PHP/Laravel, Python, Django, Node.js, REST APIs
skills.Frontend & Mobile: Flutter/Dart, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, React
skills.Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, CosmosDB, Neo4j, SQLite
skills.Data & AI: Python, R, PowerBI, RAG Pipelines, LLMs, MCP, Hugging Face, Transformers, Prompt Engineering

bullets: Architected and maintained GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for Flutter iOS/Android builds, automating the full delivery cycle from code push to TestFlight and Play Store deployment.
Managed production and staging server infrastructure including disk optimization, database operations, and automated backup systems.
Implemented Cloudflare CDN and DDoS protection, handling DNS migration, SSL certificates, firewall configuration, and real visitor IP logging.
Integrated and maintained Stripe and PayPal payment systems, fixing critical issues including refund calculation errors and webhook verification flows.
Automated provisioning of 50+ Azure VMs and services using Terraform, reducing deployment time from 4 hours to 15 minutes.
Administered databases (PostgreSQL, CosmosDB) and implemented monitoring dashboards using Azure Monitor.
Reduced Azure cloud costs by 30% through resource optimization, right-sizing, and auto-scaling policies.
Implemented RBAC and security policies across Azure AD, ensuring compliance with enterprise security standards.
Built and maintained Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines for .NET and Java applications across 8 teams.
Managed AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service) clusters with Helm charts and implemented GitOps workflows.
Automated infrastructure provisioning using Terraform modules, reducing infrastructure setup time by 40%.
Configured Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and alert rules for proactive incident detection.
Provided L2/L3 cloud support for Azure infrastructure serving pharmaceutical research workloads.
Developed Power Apps and Power Automate solutions for internal workflow automation, reducing manual effort by 25%.
Managed Azure AD, VPN configurations, and network security groups for hybrid cloud environments.

education.school: Berlin School of Business and Innovation (BSBI)
